title: Gore and More
description: Gore and More is a gorey mod that adds blood and splatter to all the living entities, everyone with exclusive variations.
body: ### Gore and more is a no lag gorey mod that adds blood and gore to mobs, all with unique gore types. If you put particles to "not showing" you won't see the bigger 3d blood clumps. ### if you want to donate me on ko-fi: ## **Here are some examples:** Update Showcase: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ss8J69YqPGg](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ss8J69YqPGg) Remember to leave suggestions in the comments! (mod may be subject to some changes in the future)
